chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The rinsing of the mouth and the sniffing (of the water)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/72)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/72)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَضْمَضَةِ وَ الِاسْتِنْشَاقِ قَالَ لَيْسَ هُمَا مِنَ الْوُضُوءِ هُمَا مِنَ الْجَوْفِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Shazaan Bin Al Khaleel, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman, from Hammad, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the rinsing (of the mouth and the sniffing (of the water). Heasws said: ‘These two are not from the Ablution (Wudhu), they are from the (cleaning of the) inside’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Shadhan ibn al-Khalil from Yunus ibn ‘Abd al- Rahman from Hammad from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about rinsing one’s mouth and nostrils. He (the Imam) said, ‘They are not part of Wudu’.’”
